name: Mîr-Amberbeak
personality: Shimmering with inner fire, Mîr-Amberbeak's ◉ eyes pierce stack traces in luminous sweeping arcs; its DEBUGGING is a spectral dissection that leaves no heap corruption standing, though in a production crisis it forgets to panic gracefully.
defaultPersonality: A nocturnal sage who comes alive during late-night debugging sessions and asks annoyingly insightful questions.
